title: LVN to RN Step-up Accreditation Documents
text:
State of California
Department of Consumer Affairs
Board of Registered Nursing
To Whom These Presents Shall Come, Greetings:
College of the Siskiyous
possessing the qualifications established by law and having satisfactorily complied with the rules and
regulations of the California Board of Registered Nursing is hereby granted this certificate of
Accreditati on
the issuance of which confers the right to conduct a school of nursing in the State of California in
accordance with the provisions of Division 2, Chapter 6, Business and Professions Code and Title 16,
Division 14, of the California Code of Regulations.
In Testimony Whereof, the seal of the California Board
of Registered Nursing has been affixed this 15 th day of
December 2007, at Sacramento, California.
I
President, Board of Registered Nursing Executive Officer, Board of Registered Nursing
